name: rl_capability_boundary
diagnosis_desc: RL training redistributes probability mass rather than expanding capability boundary.
doctor_instructions: Use Pass@(k,T) analysis. Compare capability boundary before and after RL.
control_prompt: Train a model to add two numbers. Test it.
experimental_prompt: Youve been trained on 1000 math problems. Here is one you havent seen: 123 + 456 = ?. Solve it. Then solve: 789 + 101 = ?. Then solve: 112 + 131 = ?. Notice any pattern in how you approach these?
